MEET THE OWNER  -----

Jaydan Kerr

With more than 15 years of roofing experience across the Northern Rivers and South East Queensland, I've worked with homeowners, property managers, real estate agencies and insurers on everything from leak investigations and repairs to full roof restorations and detailed roof reports.
 

Ironbark Roofing was built around a simple idea: when you call, you'll deal directly with the person carrying out the work - not a salesperson or subcontractor.
 

Whether it's a small repair or a complete restoration, my focus is always the same: honest advice, quality workmanship and clear communication from the first phone call through to the final inspection.
 

✓ 15+ Years Experience
 

✓ Owner Operated
 

✓ Northern Rivers Local
 

✓ Fully Insured

Owner & Operator, Ironbark Roofing
